chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 527 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 08.09.2023 Mr. Asif Ali Kolachi, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Ali Murad Malano, Advocate for applicant along with applicant who has filed statements with some documents/photographs. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J. – Complainant is in charge Forester, Belo Panhwari Beat. On the day of incident (05.10.2022), when he was on patrolling, he spotted applicant and co-accused Muhammad Sharif cutting trees on forest land. He prevented them, but applicant shoved and pushed him, hence FIR. 2. Learned Counsel for applicant submits that some of the offences are non-bailable, but do not fall within prohibitory clause under Section 497(i) CrPC, and that applicant himself has planted so many trees on the forest land and has further undertaken through a statement that he would continue to plant trees on the forest land and never indulge in felling the trees. Planting of the trees by the applicant on the forest land has been confirmed by the complainant. Hence, learned Additional Prosecutor General gives his no objection for grant of bail. 3. In view of the facts and circumstances, this application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail already granted to applicant vide order dated 08.08.2023 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. J U D G E Abdul Basit
